_comment: Return this inside your apply webhook JSON (POST target: BACKEND_JOB_APPLICATION_WEBHOOK_URL). Next.js reads `id` / person id and optional `screening` — persisted on the Firestore jobApplications doc and returned to the candidate browser.

screening.summary: Strong alignment with the stack and seniority; location and contract preferences match the listing.
screening.insight: Eight years shipping React and Node in product teams; leadership experience is lighter than the JD’s ideal but the technical bar is clearly met. Remote in UK matches the role.

attributes.experience: 8 years full-stack product engineering; 3 years staff-level scope

_matchScore: Integer 0–100. If fitLevel is omitted, the app derives it from the score.
